Personal Lessons

02.

Group Training

Dynamic group sessions on hitting fundamentals.

About Me

Matthew Evans isn’t just an instructor—he’s a student of the game who lives it daily. A standout utility force for the Las Vegas Titans and Doral Academy, Matthew commands both corners of the infield with elite glove work at 1B and 3B.
